title: Web Developer
about: I am a dedicated Software Engineer and Web Developer with over a decade of experience building, optimizing, and maintaining websites and e-commerce solutions. My career journey has taken me from data entry and billing systems to advanced WordPress, WooCommerce, and Laravel development, custom plugin creation, and QA automation.

I specialize in crafting responsive, high-performing websites and e-commerce platforms that enhance user experience and drive measurable results—such as boosting client engagement, increasing sales, and improving retention. My technical expertise spans HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, Laravel, WordPress, WooCommerce, and API integrations, supported by strong testing and automation skills using Selenium, JMeter, Postman, and Git.

Beyond development, I have a proven track record in quality assurance and performance testing, ensuring reliable and efficient systems. I thrive on solving complex problems, collaborating with teams, and continuously learning new frameworks and technologies, including React and AI.
With a passion for innovation and detail-oriented execution, I aim to deliver user-friendly, scalable, and future-ready solutions that create lasting value for businesses and their customers.

portfolio.title: My Bento Theme Portfolio
portfolio.description: A modern and responsive portfolio showcasing my web development projects, technical skills, and experience. Built to highlight my work and connect with opportunities in the tech industry.
